text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 09. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. I've got the grocery list ready. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
